title: ReproducibilityClass
description: The class assigned to a target quantity by the Study Interpreter BEFORE any analysis runs. Committing this up front is the anti-tuning safeguard: the Comparator scores against the pre-assigned class, never one chosen after seeing results.
$comment: exact = should match to the decimal. within-tolerance = match within a configured band. coarsening-limited = cannot match exactly because a needed variable was coarsened/removed from the public file; expect a known-direction divergence. not-reproducible = required info is absent from the file or the paper.
